title: Ocugen Provides Q1 2026 Business Update and Financial Results
text: Ocugen provided a comprehensive business update alongside Q1 2026 financial results, highlighting significant clinical progress and strong financial position. Clinical Highlights. OCU400 (Retinitis Pigmentosa): Enrollment completion in Phase 3 liMeliGhT trial ahead of schedule with 140 patients dosed. Interim data expected Q3 2026. Rolling BLA submission scheduled to begin Q3 2026. FDA approval targeted for Q4 2027, with potential commercialization in 2027. OCU410ST (Stargardt Disease): Enrollment and dosing completed ahead of original timeline. Interim data expected Q3 2026. Phase II/III data anticipated Q2 2027. BLA submission targeted for mid-2027. OCU410 (Geographic Atrophy): Positive 12-month Phase 2 data showed 31% lesion reduction in treated eyes (medium dose). Full Phase 2 data expected in upcoming releases. Phase 3 trial initiation planned for late 2026. Financial Results. Q1 2026 Revenue: $1.53 million, exceeding estimates of $501K by 205%. Q1 2026 EPS: -$0.06, missing consensus estimate of -$0.05. Operating Expenses: $19.4 million, up 21.3% year-over-year. Cash Position: $32.2 million as of March 31, 2026, expected to reach $112.1 million after $115 million convertible notes offering. Management Commentary: CEO Dr. Shankar Musunuri emphasized completion of enrollment in two late-stage programs ahead of schedule, positioning the company well for future product launches and potential approvals in 2027-2028.
